chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P. No. D- 371 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For hearing of main case 17-11-2022 Mr. Muhammad Raza Abro, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ashfaque Hussain Abro, Assistant Attorney General. ***** Learned counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press the instant petition and further states that the petitioner shall approach the Electric Inspector for redressal of his grievance regarding impugned detection. Accordingly, instant petition stands dismissed as not pressed leaving the petitioner at liberty to avail his remedy in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
